name: @goplausible/travala-plugin-openclaw
description: Travala hotel booking integration for OpenClaw — by GoPlausible
author: GoPlausible <info@goplausible.com>

scripts.build: rm -rf dist && tsc && test -f dist/index.js && test -f dist/setup.js && test -f dist/lib/mcp-servers.js
scripts.retag: git tag -d "travala-v$npm_package_version" 2>/dev/null; git push origin ":refs/tags/travala-v$npm_package_version" 2>/dev/null; git tag -a "travala-v$npm_package_version" -m "travala-v$npm_package_version" && git push origin "travala-v$npm_package_version"
scripts.publish:clawhub: npm run build && clawhub package publish . --family code-plugin --name @goplausible/travala-plugin-openclaw --display-name 'Travala Plugin' --version "$npm_package_version" --tags latest --source-repo GoPlausible/openclaw-algorand-plugin --source-commit "$(git rev-parse "travala-v$npm_package_version")" --source-ref "travala-v$npm_package_version"
